title: cinnamomum frodinii
intro: Cinnamomum frodinii, also known as Mountain cinnamon or Frodin's cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Cinnamomum frodinii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cinnamomum frodinii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Cinnamomum frodinii can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
